mapper.insert: insert into article_reactions (article_id, user_id, reaction_type, created_at) values (#{articleReaction.articleId}, #{articleReaction.userId}, #{articleReaction.reactionType}, #{articleReaction.createdAt})
mapper.delete: delete from article_reactions where article_id = #{reaction.articleId} and user_id = #{reaction.userId}
mapper.select: select AR.article_id articleReactionArticleId, AR.user_id articleReactionUserId, AR.reaction_type articleReactionType, AR.created_at articleReactionCreatedAt from article_reactions AR where AR.article_id = #{articleId} and AR.user_id = #{userId}
